ham.subject: Update to Company Leave Policy Effective May 1, 2026
ham.body:
Dear Team,

I hope you are all doing well.  As part of our ongoing efforts to improve employee wellbeing and ensure clarity across all departments, we are rolling out a revised leave policy that will take effect on May 1, 2026.

Key highlights of the new policy include:
- 25 paid vacation days per calendar year (up from 20), with a rollover cap of 5 days.
- 10 paid sick days per year, with the option to carry over up to 2 days.
- 3 days of personal leave per year for non‑work related emergencies.
- A new “flexible‑work” option that allows employees to take up to 2 paid days per month for remote work, subject to managerial approval.
- Updated procedures for submitting leave requests: simply log in to the HR portal and submit your request at least 2 weeks in advance.

All employees are encouraged to review the full policy document, which is attached to this email.  If you have any questions or need clarification, please reach out to HR at hr@company.com.

Thank you for your cooperation and for helping us create a healthier, more balanced workplace.

Best regards,

Sarah Patel
Director of Human Resources

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – QuickBooks Invoice Payment Due
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We have noticed that an invoice from QuickBooks/Norton accounting software (Invoice #QB-INV-2026-045) remains outstanding.  The amount of $3,247.50 was due on April 15, 2026, and as of today it is 30 days past due.

If payment is not received within the next 48 hours, your QuickBooks account will be suspended and all associated services (including Norton security updates) will be terminated.  Failure to resolve this matter may also result in additional late fees and a negative impact on your credit score.

To verify and settle your invoice, please log in to our secure portal at <URL> and follow the on‑screen instructions.  If you believe this is an error, please contact QuickBooks support immediately at <URL>.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this critical matter.

Sincerely,

QuickBooks Payment Services
Billing Department
